zh.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 德 拉 祖
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily Foljambe於1250年出生在英國德比夏爾迪德斯維爾時，她的父親Thomas Foljambe44歲，母親Margaret Gernon43歲。她於1280年與Robert de Eccleshall在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1303年在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily Foljambe于1250年出生在英国德比夏爾迪德斯維爾时，她的父亲Thomas Foljambe44岁，母亲Margaret Gernon43岁。她于1280年与Robert de Eccleshall在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1303年在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Foljambe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French fol ‘foolish, silly’ + jambe ‘leg’, probably a nickname for a lame person, someone with a maimed or crooked leg; compare Belgian . In Old French fol could be used of something useless or of little value, e.g. farine folle ‘mill dust’.

variants.name: Fulljames
meanings: English: variant of Foljambe with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Belgian
meanings: Norman, English, Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French bele jambe ‘fine leg’.

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily Foljambe was born in 1250, in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England, her father, Thomas Foljambe, was 44 and her mother, Margaret Gernon, was 43. She married Robert de Eccleshall in 1280, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1303, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily Foljambe est née en 1250, à Tideswell, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Foljambe, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Margaret Gernon, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Robert d’Eccleshall en 1280, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1303, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily Foljambe 1250 in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Foljambe 44 und ihre Mutter Margaret Gernon 43. Sie hat 1280 in Yorkshire, England Robert de Eccleshall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1303 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Stafford, Staffordshire, England.

Lei sposato Robert de Eccleshall nel 1280, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1303, nel Stafford, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Foljambeが1250年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアティデスウエルで生まれた時，父Thomas Foljambeは44歳，母Margaret Gernonは43歳であった。1280年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでRobert de Eccleshallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1303年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードで53歳で死去した。

ko.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치
ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Foljambe(이)가 1250년 영국 더비실르 티데스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Foljambe(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Gernon(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1280년 영국 요르크실르에서 Robert de Eccleshall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1303년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Foljambe nasceu em 1250, em Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Foljambe, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Gernon, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Eccleshall em 1280, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1303, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily Foljambe родилась в 1250 г. в местности тидесвелл, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Foljambe было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Gernon, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Eccleshall в 1280 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1303 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

Se casó con Robert de Eccleshall en 1280, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1303, en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
